chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-59 of 2023. (Hanif Chijan Vs. P.O Sindh Muhammad & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 27-11-2023. Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan Leghari, advocate for the petitioner. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General. ******** At the very outset it is stated by learned AAG on behalf of office respondents that they have no intention to harass the petition without due course of law. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statement of learned AAG, does not press the instant petition, it is disposed of accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
